name: Torque Tune Gear
name_jp: トルクチューン・ギア
desc: Once per turn, you can either: Target 1 monster you control; equip this card to that target, OR: Unequip this card and Special Summon it. A monster equipped with this card is treated as a Tuner, it gains 500 ATK/DEF, also if the equipped monster would be destroyed by battle or card effect, destroy this card instead.
mnst_eff: Once per turn, you can either: Target 1 monster you control; equip this card to that target, OR: Unequip this card and Special Summon it. A monster equipped with this card is treated as a Tuner, it gains 500 ATK/DEF, also if the equipped monster would be destroyed by battle or card effect, destroy this card instead.
eff: Once per turn, you can either: Target 1 monster you control; equip this card to that target, OR: Unequip this card and Special Summon it. A monster equipped with this card is treated as a Tuner, it gains 500 ATK/DEF, also if the equipped monster would be destroyed by battle or card effect, destroy this card instead.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your Spell & Trap Zone
